'''bapuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niceling|niceling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-p-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niceling|niceling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bapuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæpizhith|bæpizhith]] || [[word:bæpizhij|bæpizhij]] || [[word:bæpizhish|bæpizhish]] || [[word:bæpizhi|bæpizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bapupuzhuth|bapupuzhuth]] || [[word:bapupuzhuj|bapupuzhuj]] || [[word:bapupuzhush|bapupuzhush]] || [[word:bapupuzhu|bapupuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bapuzhuth|bapuzhuth]] || [[word:bapuzhuj|bapuzhuj]] || [[word:bapuzhush|bapuzhush]] || [[word:bapuzhu|bapuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bapufzhuth|bapufzhuth]] || [[word:bapufzhuj|bapufzhuj]] || [[word:bapufzhush|bapufzhush]] || [[word:bapufzhuf|bapufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bapuzhuthu|bapuzhuthu]] || [[word:bapuzhuju|bapuzhuju]] || [[word:bapuzhushu|bapuzhushu]] || [[word:bapuzhuku|bapuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bapuzhuth|bapuzhuth]] || [[word:bapuzhuj|bapuzhuj]] || [[word:bapuzhush|bapuzhush]] || [[word:bapuzhu|bapuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bapuzhuthul|bapuzhuthul]] || [[word:bapuzhujul|bapuzhujul]] || [[word:bapuzhushul|bapuzhushul]] || [[word:bapuzhukul|bapuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bapuzhuthuthu|bapuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:bapuzhujuju|bapuzhujuju]] || [[word:bapuzhushushu|bapuzhushushu]] || [[word:bapuzhuku|bapuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bapuzhuthun|bapuzhuthun]] || [[word:bapuzhujun|bapuzhujun]] || [[word:bapuzhushun|bapuzhushun]] || [[word:bapuzhukun|bapuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bapuzhuthuoro|bapuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:bapuzhujuoro|bapuzhujuoro]] || [[word:bapuzhushuoro|bapuzhushuoro]] || [[word:bapuzhukuoro|bapuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
